subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Us unto them that have believed in God, the Single One, the All-Informed, that it may draw them at one time unto My dominion and at another unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن آمن بالله الفرد الخبیر لیجذبه مره الی جبروتی و طورا الی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @knowledge; recognition of God, @power of prayer, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
